summary: Backend testing: 100% pass (18/18 tests). Frontend testing: Critical bug found - expo-secure-store not compatible with web preview, preventing login from working. All backend APIs functional, but frontend cannot store JWT tokens in browser environment.

integration_issues.issue: expo-secure-store.setItemAsync() not available in web environment - login fails with 'ExpoSecureStore.default.setValueWithKeyAsync is not a function'. This prevents users from logging in via web preview.
After login button click, app stays on /login route instead of navigating to /(tabs) home screen. This is caused by the secure store error preventing token storage.

react_native_issues.issue: SecureStore is a native module that doesn't work in web browsers. Need fallback to localStorage/sessionStorage for web platform. File: /app/frontend/src/api.ts lines 19, 32, 34

action_items: Fix expo-secure-store web compatibility in /app/frontend/src/api.ts - add Platform.OS === 'web' check and use localStorage as fallback
After fixing secure store, retest login flow to verify navigation to home tabs works
Add testID attributes to tab navigation elements (Home, Explore, Add, Saved, Profile tabs)
Add testID attributes to spot cards for easier testing
Test onboarding flow progression through slides
Test spot detail page navigation and content
critical_code_review_comments: expo-secure-store is not web-compatible - /app/frontend/src/api.ts needs Platform.OS check with localStorage fallback for web
All backend responses correctly exclude _id and password_hash fields ✓
JWT Bearer auth working correctly on backend ✓
Privacy enforcement working (403 for private spots) ✓
seed_data_creation: Backend already seeded with 1 admin (admin@photoscout.app), 5 photographers (demo123 password), 21 Texas spots. Test suite creates TEST_ prefixed data for testing which can be cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully functional. Frontend has critical blocker: expo-secure-store doesn't work in web browsers. After main agent fixes api.ts to use localStorage for web, need to retest: (1) login flow and navigation to tabs, (2) home feed display with sections, (3) spot card navigation, (4) tab switching, (5) onboarding progression, (6) paywall display.
rca_of_issue: Root Cause: expo-secure-store is a native iOS/Android module that has no web implementation. When login succeeds (backend returns 200 OK with token), the frontend tries to call SecureStore.setItemAsync() to store the JWT token. In web environment, this function doesn't exist, causing error 'ExpoSecureStore.default.setValueWithKeyAsync is not a function'. The error is caught in login.tsx try/catch (line 40), displayed to user, and prevents navigation to home screen. Reproduction: (1) Open web preview, (2) Navigate to login, (3) Enter valid credentials, (4) Click Sign in, (5) Error appears below password field. Mitigation: Add Platform.OS check in api.ts to use localStorage.setItem() for web and SecureStore for native platforms.
